name: preload-conan
description: Build conan cache per arch and upload to packagerepo

options.name: arch
options.help: amd64, arm64, riscv64, ppc64le, or all

options.name: ver
options.help: Version tag for the conan cache

steps.command:
if [ "{opt.arch}" = "all" ]; then printf 'amd64
arm64
riscv64
ppc64le'; else echo "{opt.arch}"; fi
if [ "{arch}" = "riscv64" ] || [ "{arch}" = "ppc64le" ]; then echo 'true'; else echo 'false'; fi

if [ "{is_exotic}" = "true" ]; then echo 'conan profile detect && printf "
[platform_tool_requires]
cmake/3.31.6
" >> ~/.conan2/profiles/default &&'; else echo 'conan profile detect &&'; fi

docker run --rm --platform linux/{arch} -v {repo_root}/backend:/src -e CONAN_SKIP_TEST=1 -e CONAN_CPU_COUNT=14 debian:sid sh -c "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq gcc-13 g++-13 make cmake python3 python3-pip python3-venv pkg-config libpq-dev libssl-dev zlib1g-dev perl ca-certificates >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 -m venv /tmp/venv && /tmp/venv/bin/pip install conan >/dev/null 2>&1 && export PATH=/tmp/venv/bin:\$PATH && {profile_cmd} cd /src && conan install . --output-folder=/tmp/build --build=missing -s build_type=Release && tar czf /tmp/conan-cache.tar.gz -C ~ .conan2 && cat /tmp/conan-cache.tar.gz" > /tmp/conan-{arch}.tar.gz
